title: Resource Not Found
description: The requested resource does not exist — e.g. an unknown Pokémon name or id.
resolution: Check the identifier. Names are lowercase and hyphenated (e.g. `mr-mime`); ids are positive integers within the resource's range.

title: Too Many Requests
description: You have exceeded the fair-use rate limit for the shared public API.
resolution: Cache responses locally and back off before retrying. PokéAPI data is effectively static, so repeated identical requests are unnecessary.

title: Internal Server Error
description: An unexpected error occurred on the PokéAPI servers.
resolution: Retry with exponential backoff. If it persists, check the PokéAPI status page or GitHub issues.
